Graph Based Methods in Topological Data Analysis

A workshop on graph methods and topological data analysis

📅 July 27–29, 2026    📍 Michigan State University, East Lansing

Important Dates

All deadlines are 11:59 PM Eastern Time.

  • TBDRegistration opens
  • TBDContributed talk & poster submission deadline
  • TBDNotification of acceptance
  • TBDFinancial support application deadline
  • TBDEarly registration deadline
  • TBDRegistration deadline
  • July 27, 2026Workshop begins

Financial Support

Limited financial support may be available for graduate students and early-career researchers. To apply, please fill out the relevant section in the registration form. Priority will be given to participants presenting a talk or poster.
